caption: A person wearing a grey long-sleeved shirt and a gold-toned smartwatch on their left wrist is shown working on a white wooden surface. In their left hand, they hold the cap of a small white glue tube, while their right hand holds the body of the tube. The tube has black text that reads "Tacky Glue" repeated along its length. Next to their hands are a blue piece of cardstock and a white card with floral illustrations and the words "rm heart" visible. Across the sequence, the person carefully removes the cap from the glue tube. As they pull the cap away, the adhesive tip becomes exposed, and the hands shift position to fully separate the cap from the tube. The background remains static throughout the process, focusing on the hands and the crafting supplies.
